sections.title: 1. Service and agreement
sections.body: Date Navi (the “Service”) helps couples plan dates and manage preferences and memories together. By using the Service, you agree to these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Account and couple sharing
sections.body: You must create an account through social sign-in and keep your information accurate. The minimum age and any parental-consent requirement are [Minimum age/consent requirement] and must be finalized before release. Once you connect as a couple, the profile, preferences, date cards, reactions, and memories designated for sharing in the Service may be visible to your partner.

sections.title: 3. Permitted and prohibited use
sections.body: Use the Service only for personal, lawful purposes. You may not impersonate others, infringe rights, harass people, post unlawful or harmful content, bypass or disrupt security, or make unauthorized commercial use.

sections.title: 4. User content
sections.body: You are responsible for the text, photos, preferences, and records you submit. You allow us to store, display, and transmit that content as needed to operate the Service and share it with your connected partner.

sections.title: 5. AI and place-information limits
sections.body: AI-generated or AI-assisted recommendations are for reference and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or out of date. Place and business information may change; verify it yourself before visiting and make your own decisions.

sections.title: 6. Third-party services
sections.body: The Service may use third-party services including Google, Kakao, Supabase, and Anthropic for sign-in, data storage, AI processing, and place search. Their own terms and policies may apply to those services. Selecting map or review actions opens Kakao Map and Naver external links, and those services’ terms and privacy policies apply.

sections.title: 7. Availability and changes
sections.body: We may change, add, suspend, or discontinue features, including for maintenance. We will make reasonable efforts to notify you of material changes.

sections.title: 8. Account termination
sections.body: You may request account deletion through the in-app account-deletion feature. We may limit or end access as necessary for a Terms violation, security risk, or legal requirement.

sections.title: 9. Disclaimer, liability, and governing rules
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, the accuracy of AI or place information, or fitness for a particular purpose. The scope of liability and [Governing law/venue] must be reviewed and set under applicable law and the finalized operator information.

sections.title: 10. Contact and reviewer note
sections.body:
Service contact: jake051096@gmail.com

Reviewer note: Before release, confirm and replace [Effective date], [Legal entity/operator], [Business address], and [Governing law/venue].

sections.title: 1. Controller and contact
sections.body:
Privacy controller: [Legal entity/operator], [Business address]
Privacy contact: jake051096@gmail.com

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.body: We may process your social sign-in account identifier and email; profile nickname and avatar URL; couple connection data; preferences and date-planning inputs; cards, reactions, comments, memories, and photos; selected place and location data; and service-use, error, and analytics logs.

sections.title: 3. How we use data
sections.body: We use data to provide sign-in and account management, couple connection and sharing, personalized date recommendations and place search, memory storage, and security, error response, and service improvement.

sections.title: 4. Sharing and processing providers
sections.body: As needed to operate the Service, we may process data with Supabase (authentication, database, and storage), Anthropic (prompts used for AI recommendations), Kakao (place search), and Google and Kakao (social sign-in). We may deliver Expo push notifications only when notifications are enabled. We do not sell personal information. Selecting map or review actions opens Kakao Map and Naver external links, and those services’ terms and privacy policies apply.

sections.title: 5. Public uploads
sections.body: Profile photos are stored in the avatars bucket and memory photos in the memories bucket. Both use public read access and public URLs, so anyone with a URL can access a file without signing in. Do not upload sensitive photos or personal information.

sections.title: 6. Permissions
sections.body: Photo and media permission may be requested when you select or upload a photo, location permission may be requested when you use location-based recommendations, and optional notification permission may be requested when you choose to receive push notifications. You can deny or withdraw permissions in device settings, although related features may be limited.

sections.title: 7. Retention and deletion
sections.body: Account and content data are retained while needed to provide the Service. You may delete an individual memory or request account deletion. The current code does not demonstrate a time-based automatic purge schedule, so we do not promise automatic, immediate, or complete deletion; handling periods for public storage files and backups must be finalized before release.

sections.title: 8. Security
sections.body: We use reasonable safeguards including authentication, database access controls, and owner-based upload, update, and deletion policies. Files in public-read buckets are an exception because they can be accessed through public URLs.

sections.title: 9. Your rights and contact
sections.body: To the extent allowed by applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, or object to processing of your data. Send requests to jake051096@gmail.com.

sections.title: 10. Reviewer note
sections.body: Before release, review and finalize [Effective date], [Legal entity/operator], [Business address], retention, backup, international-transfer details, and any disclosures required by applicable law.
